name: PINEAL CELL TUMORS
definition: TUMORS OF PINEAL PARENCHYMAL ORIGIN highly malignant tumor derived from primitive pineal parenchymal cells rare slow-growing unencapsulated tumor uni- / bilateral ocular retinoblastomas + midline small cell tumor
